executive: Proptech VC Partner, $500M Series A/B Fund
key_insight: The thesis is correct that agents are translators and AI absorbs translation — but the 93% of consumers who use agents aren't paying for translation, they're paying for accountability, and no one has solved how to make an AI accountable when a $400K transaction goes sideways.
critical_weaknesses: CRITICAL: No legal infrastructure (attorney, E&O, compliance)
HIGH: Solo founder risk in trust-dependent business
HIGH: Consumer trust gap for six-figure transactions
HIGH: Unit economics unproven and potentially inverted
deal_breakers: Solo founder with no RE industry experience on team
killer_features: Negotiation intelligence with comp data transparency
Consumer preview endpoint (zero-friction top of funnel)
investment_verdict: Not investable at this stage. Come back with 25 completed transactions, positive unit economics, an attorney on the team, and MLS access secured.
